compiled_state.title: Figma integration for human design input

comments.body: Decomposed into 3 focused epics via /dso:brainstorm session (2026-03-30): (1) Push: 148e-61c8 — SVG export + revision image + blocking, (2) Pull API+Merge: 6863-7b38 — REST API integration + manifest regeneration, (3) Pull Validation: 4f8e-a7a6 — perceptual diff fidelity scoring. Research artifacts in .claude/artifacts/figma-*.md. Original epic superseded.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
